You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 15 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under-repr

Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5 November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 4 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 15 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under-repr

Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5 November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 4 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 15 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under-repr

glasgow-geoinformation-technology-cartog.excerpt: Application deadlines search Study Research Explore Connect Search icon Close menu icon Menu icon bar 1 Menu icon bar 2 Menu icon bar 3 Home Postgraduate study Taught degree programmes A‑Z Geoinformation Technology & Cartography with Work Placement Postgraduate study Postgraduate study Taught degree programmes A‑Z Geoinformation Technology & Cartography with Work Placement How to apply Eng lang ERs Application deadlines Postgraduate taught Geoinformation Technology & Cartography with Work Placement MSc Our Masters in Geoinformation Technology & Cartography with Work Placement is an industry-focused programme. It develops advanced skills in GIS, cartography, and geospatial data technologies alongside a six-month, credit-bearing professional placement. Replacing the traditional MSc thesis, the placement enables students to apply technical expertise directly within industry, government, or consultancy environments. Graduates complete the programme with practical experience, professional confidence, and strong employability in the geospatial sector. Academic contact: Mingshu.Wang@glasgow.ac.uk Teaching start: September Glasgow: Gilmorehill campus and Work placement MSc: 15 months full-

It develops advanced skills in GIS, cartography, and geospatial data technologies alongside a six-month, credit-bearing professional placement. Replacing the traditional MSc thesis, the placement enables students to apply technical expertise directly within industry, government, or consultancy environments. Graduates complete the programme with practical experience, professional confidence, and strong employability in the geospatial sector. glasgow-geomatics-management-msc-2026-in.excerpt: Application deadlines International & EU applicants Due to demand for degree places on this programme, the University has an application process with application rounds which recognises that different geographical areas complete and submit their applications at different times of the year. This process aims to ensure fairness and equity to applicants from all geographic regions. Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5 November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 4 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 15 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under-repr

Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5 November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 4 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 15 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under-repr

Due to demand for degree places on this programme, the University has an application process with application rounds which recognises that different geographical areas complete and submit their applications at different times of the year. This process aims to ensure fairness and equity to applicants from all geographic regions. Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5 November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 4 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 P

Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5 November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 4 March 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 15 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under-repr

Round 1 application dates: 1 October 2025 to 5th November 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 16 January 2026. Round 2 application dates: 6 November 2025 to 17 December 2025 All International and EU applications submitted within these dates will be reviewed with no priority given to any geographic region. You will receive our decision on your application by 25 February 2026. Round 3 application dates: 18 December 2025 to 4 February 2026 Priority will be given to under-represented geographic regions. You will receive our decision on your application by 8 April 2026. Round 4 application dates: 5 February 2026 to 25 March 2026 Priority will be given to under
